attributes.description: Kubernetes overview with resource counts. Start here to navigate your Kubernetes resources.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name)
  | EVAL total_clusters = CASE(count > 0, TO_STRING(count), "No data")

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name)
  | EVAL total_clusters = CASE(count > 0, TO_STRING(count), "No data")

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
      ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE
        k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
        BY k8s.cluster.name
  | STATS healthy_count = COUNT() WHERE ready_nodes == total_nodes

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
      ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE
        k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
        BY k8s.cluster.name
  | STATS healthy_count = COUNT() WHERE ready_nodes == total_nodes

embeddableConfig.description: Clusters where all nodes are ready. Healthy = every node has condition_ready > 0.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
      ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE
        k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
        BY k8s.cluster.name
  | STATS unhealthy_count = COUNT() WHERE ready_nodes < total_nodes

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
      ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE
        k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
        BY k8s.cluster.name
  | STATS unhealthy_count = COUNT() WHERE ready_nodes < total_nodes

embeddableConfig.description: Clusters with at least one not-ready node. Uses k8s.node.condition_ready to classify health.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| STATS healthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| STATS healthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| STATS unhealthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| STATS unhealthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND (k8s.node.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL)
  | STATS cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
    BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | EVAL cpu_util = cpu_usage / alloc_cpu
  | KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, cpu_util
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, cpu_util DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND (k8s.node.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL)
  | STATS cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
    BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | EVAL cpu_util = cpu_usage / alloc_cpu
  | KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, cpu_util
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, cpu_util DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by CPU utilization
embeddableConfig.description:
CPU utilization per node: usage / allocatable.

Healthy: < 60% · At risk: 60–80% · Unhealthy: > 80%

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND (k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL)
  | STATS mem_ws = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
    BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | EVAL mem_util = TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem)
  | KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, mem_util
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, mem_util DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND (k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL)
  | STATS mem_ws = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
    BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | EVAL mem_util = TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem)
  | KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, mem_util
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, mem_util DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by memory working set utilization
embeddableConfig.description:
Memory utilization per node: working set / allocatable.

Healthy: < 60% · At risk: 60–80% · Unhealthy: > 80%

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
  | STATS fs_usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), fs_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
    BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | EVAL disk_util = TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap)
  | KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, disk_util
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, disk_util DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
  | STATS fs_usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), fs_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
    BY k8s.node.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | EVAL disk_util = TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap)
  | KEEP k8s.node.name, @timestamp, disk_util
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, disk_util DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by disk usage
embeddableConfig.description:
Disk utilization per node: usage / capacity.

Healthy: < 60% · At risk: 60–80% · Unhealthy: > 80%

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| STATS ns_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| STATS ns_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL key = CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
  | STATS
      total_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(key),
      running_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | EVAL non_running_pods = total_pods - running_pods
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, non_running_pods
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, non_running_pods DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL key = CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
  | STATS
      total_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(key),
      running_pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | EVAL non_running_pods = total_pods - running_pods
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, non_running_pods
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, non_running_pods DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by non-running pods
embeddableConfig.description:
Count of pods not in Running phase per namespace.

Non-running pods may indicate scheduling issues or resource constraints.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND container.memory.major_page_faults IS NOT NULL
| STATS container_faults = MAX(container.memory.major_page_faults)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS page_faults = SUM(container_faults)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, page_faults
| SORT @timestamp ASC, page_faults DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND container.memory.major_page_faults IS NOT NULL
| STATS container_faults = MAX(container.memory.major_page_faults)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS page_faults = SUM(container_faults)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, page_faults
| SORT @timestamp ASC, page_faults DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by major page faults
embeddableConfig.description:
Major page faults per namespace over time.

High values indicate memory pressure and potential OOM kills.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  | STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, restarts
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, restarts DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  | STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP k8s.namespace.name, @timestamp, restarts
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, restarts DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by container restarts
embeddableConfig.description:
Container restarts per namespace.

Shows the 10 namespaces with the most restarts.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.statefulset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.statefulset.name)
| STATS statefulset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.statefulset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.statefulset.name)
| STATS statefulset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.replicaset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.replicaset.name)
| STATS replicaset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.replicaset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.replicaset.name)
| STATS replicaset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.daemonset.name)
| STATS daemonset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.daemonset.name)
| STATS daemonset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.job.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.job.name)
| STATS job_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.job.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.job.name)
| STATS job_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=concat(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.deployment.name)
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=concat(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.deployment.name)
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS pod_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS pod_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name, ":", k8s.container.name)
| STATS container_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name, ":", k8s.container.name)
| STATS container_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS running_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS running_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS pending_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS pending_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS failed_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 4

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS failed_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 4

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL pod = CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
  | STATS cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage)
    BY pod, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP pod, @timestamp, cpu_usage
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, cpu_usage DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL pod = CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
  | STATS cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage)
    BY pod, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP pod, @timestamp, cpu_usage
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, cpu_usage DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by max CPU usage
embeddableConfig.description:
Max CPU usage per pod (cores).

Shows the 10 pods consuming the most CPU.

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL pod = CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
  | STATS mem_ws = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set)
    BY pod, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP pod, @timestamp, mem_ws
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, mem_ws DESC
  | LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL pod = CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
  | STATS mem_ws = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set)
    BY pod, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

Max memory working set per namespace.

Shows the 10 pods consuming the most memory.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL pod = CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
  | STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY pod, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP pod, @timestamp, restarts
  | SORT @timestamp ASC, restarts DESC

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL pod = CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
  | STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY pod, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
